name: Voice
description: Text-to-speech, speech-to-text, and voice cloning for TheItemApp, backed by a voice-api proxy over an OmniVoice engine. Ships federated prefabs — Studio (type-to-speak + transcribe), Dictaphone (record/import audio into transcribed voice notes), a push-to-talk Mic Button and Speaker that any app can embed, and voice Settings — over two data models: a catalog of cloneable voices and the user's voice notes.
